across.clue: A harvest is the act of collecting food from farming.
an annoying complaint especially about something that is not important.
A carpenter is a person who builds things with wood.
If things or people are awesome, they are impressive or frightening.
If something is metropolitan, it relates to a large city.
To define means to clearly state, show, or explain what something is.
An idiot is a person who is not smart or who has done something silly.
Ash is the grey or black powder created when something is burned.
If something is native, it refers to the place someone was born and raised.
A raisin is a dried grape.

down.clue: An expense is the money that people spend on something.
An excerpt is a short piece of writing or music taken from a larger piece.
When someone is irritable, they become annoyed or angry very easily.
A loose thing is not held in place tightly.
To paraphrase is to make someone else’s writing or speech shorter.
Relating to the ability to think in an intelligent way and to understand things especially difficult or complicated ideas and subjects.
Your conscience is your inner sense of what is right and wrong.
Compassion is a feeling of sympathy and concern for others.
To manufacture something means to make it in a factory.
Someone who is much more intelligent or skillful than other people.
